## 🔄 Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style update (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Build configuration change
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

## ✅ Checklist

### **Code Quality**
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have followed the DDD (Domain-Driven Design) architecture pattern

### **Testing**
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have maintained or improved the test coverage
- [ ] All tests pass (100% pass rate maintained)

### **Documentation**
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added/updated JSDoc comments for new/modified functions
- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if applicable)

### **Dependencies**
- [ ] I have not introduced new dependencies without discussion
- [ ] If I added dependencies, I have justified them in the PR description
- [ ] All dependencies are properly licensed (MIT-compatible)

### **Breaking Changes**
- [ ] This PR does not introduce breaking changes
- [ ] If it does, I have documented them clearly
- [ ] I have updated the migration guide (if applicable)
